overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in traditional Asian attire exploring a multi-level wooden building at dusk. The character ascends stairs and walks through dimly lit corridors and open walkways illuminated by warm lanterns, featuring traditional architectural elements like lattice windows and wooden beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase connecting floors in traditional inn

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide wooden staircase from a lower dining area

entered.detail: wide wooden stairs with dark steps and thick support beams
lower floor with wooden tables and benches visible below
thick dark wooden structural pillars supporting the building
illuminated traditional lanterns hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a wide wooden staircase inside a traditional Asian building. Below, a dining area with tables is visible, while warm paper lanterns provide illumination against the dark wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air wooden walkway with sunset view

events.description: exits enclosed stairwell onto open-air walkway with view of sunset sky

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated wooden walkway with railings on the right side

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with polished floorboards
rolled bamboo blinds hanging on the exterior wall
warm orange and pink sunset visible through open sides of walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open-air wooden walkway bathed in the warm glow of sunset. Bamboo blinds line the right wall while the left side opens to the evening sky, with paper lanterns beginning to glow in the dimming light.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated communal dining platform with fabric canopy

events.description: enters covered communal area with colorful fabric decorations overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through a decorated platform area toward an NPC standing near a fire pit

notable_agents.action: standing near the fire pit facing away from the camera, wearing white robes

entered.detail: open platform area with wooden flooring and railings
decorative red and green triangular fabric banners hanging overhead
large black cauldron or brazier with flames visible
food preparation area with counters and cooking implements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a decorated communal platform covered by colorful fabric canopies. An NPC in white robes stands near a glowing fire pit to the right, while cooking areas and wooden benches line the space. The atmosphere is warm and inviting with mixed lighting from flames and lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark enclosed corridor with lattice windows

events.description: enters dark corridor with significantly reduced lighting from lattice windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit wooden corridor with lattice windows on the left

entered.detail: narrow enclosed walkway with dark wooden walls and floor
traditional wooden lattice screens allowing dim light to filter through
illuminated paper lanterns suspended from the ceiling providing warm light
bamboo roll-up blinds covering openings on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed wooden corridor illuminated only by hanging paper lanterns and dim light filtering through lattice windows. Bamboo blinds line the right wall as the character walks deeper into the shadowy interior of the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the interior of a traditional wooden building out into a sunset-lit terrace before receding back into a shadowy corridor. It begins with the character ascending a wide wooden staircase, looking down upon a dining area illuminated by warm paper lanterns. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens onto an open-air walkway bathed in the golden glow of the evening sky and lined with bamboo blinds. The path then leads into a communal platform sheltered by colorful fabric canopies, where the lighting shifts to the flickering warmth of a fire pit and cooking areas. Finally, the environment closes in as the character enters a dark, enclosed corridor, where the bright sunset fades into dim light filtering through lattice windows and hanging lanterns.
